app.name: Dose-Wise
app.tagline: Your safety is why we ask this.

hero.title: Let's keep your medications in harmony
hero.subtitle: Our Friendly Audit tool helps you understand how your treatments interact, keeping your well-being at the heart of everything.

lactating.subtitle: Some medications can pass through breast milk.

header.title: Here's what we found for your safety

noInteractions.message: Your current medication combination appears to be safe based on our analysis. Continue taking your medications as prescribed.

header.title: Detailed Interaction Analysis
header.subtitle: In-depth clinical analysis of the interaction between {{drug1}} and {{drug2}}.

consultation.title: Need Professional Help?
consultation.subtitle: Connect with a clinical pharmacist to discuss how this interaction applies to your specific health history.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.message: Your interaction data is processed locally. Your data is never stored on our servers.

header.title: Your Path to Safety
header.subtitle: Based on our analysis of your medication combination, here are the recommended next steps to ensure your safety and well-being.

1.title: STOP Taking These Together
1.desc: These medications should never be combined. Stop taking both and seek immediate medical attention.

2.title: Contact Your Doctor
2.desc: Call your prescribing physician or healthcare provider immediately to discuss alternative options.

3.title: Seek Emergency Care
3.desc: If you are currently taking both medications, consider visiting an urgent care or emergency department.

1.title: Consult Your Physician
1.desc: Schedule an appointment with your doctor immediately to discuss this interaction and possible alternatives.

2.title: Do Not Stop Abruptly
2.desc: Do not stop taking any medications without medical supervision. Some medications require gradual discontinuation.

3.title: Consider Alternatives
3.desc: Ask your doctor about safer alternatives that achieve the same therapeutic goals without the interaction risk.

1.title: Monitor for Symptoms
1.desc: Pay close attention to any unusual symptoms or side effects while taking these medications together.

2.title: Consider Timing Separation
2.desc: Ask your pharmacist if taking these medications at different times of day could reduce the interaction risk.

3.title: Schedule a Review
3.desc: Schedule a medication review with your doctor or pharmacist within the next week to discuss this combination.

1.title: Be Aware
1.desc: While generally safe, be aware of any mild side effects that may occur from this combination.

2.title: Regular Monitoring
2.desc: Continue with your regular check-ups. Inform your doctor about all medications you are taking.

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: This analysis is for informational purposes only and does not replace professional medical advice. Always consult with a qualified healthcare provider before making any changes to your medication regimen. If you are experiencing any adverse effects, seek medical attention immediately.

noData.title: No Data Provided
noData.message: No medications were provided for analysis. Please go back to the intake form and add at least 2 medications.
